clinical_validity.rationale: The plan stays formative and uses specialty review, but clinical scenario details remain draft-level.

psychometric_defensibility.rationale: The plan preserves score-use gates and trace completeness targets, but lacks a concrete rubric and rater-calibration protocol.

technical_feasibility.rationale: The stack is plausible, but Quest/WebXR latency and runtime assumptions remain unmeasured.

architecture_coherence.rationale: The staged M0/M1 framing is coherent, but event streaming and storage boundaries need more precise interface contracts.

security_privacy.rationale: The plan identifies tenant isolation, consent, audit, and retention needs, but does not yet include a data-flow appendix.

ux_workflow_fit.rationale: Learner and faculty workflows are clear enough for planning, but review-time ergonomics need prototype validation.

cost_performance_efficiency.rationale: Scripted-first and staged XR improve cost control, but model, cloud, and staffing bands are not yet quantified.

open_source_sustainability.rationale: Marketplace deferral is sensible, but license and contribution boundaries remain undecided.

market_gtm_strength.rationale: The design-partner wedge is focused, but buyer proof points and outreach claims need verification.

evidence_discipline.rationale: The plan distinguishes internal artifacts from external evidence, but live source verification is not complete.

implementation_readiness.rationale: M0/M1/M2 staging is actionable, but milestone acceptance criteria still need drafting.

adversarial_robustness.rationale: This is the pre-challenge Core Plan, so robustness is intentionally low.

legal_regulatory_resilience.rationale: Legal concerns are identified, but counsel-ready documents and prohibited claims are not drafted.

specialty_clinical_generalizability.rationale: Specialty review needs are listed, but only the first scenario has a clear specialty center of gravity.

critical_risks.summary: External claims from prior artifacts are not yet verified for external use.
Faculty rubric and rater-calibration protocol are not yet drafted.

evidence_debt.summary: Verify current WebXR/OpenXR/headset browser capability before external architecture claims.
Verify education, assessment, and regulatory facts cited by the business-plan artifacts.

decision_debt.summary: Choose the second communication scenario scope.
Decide whether generative dialogue is prohibited through M1 or through M2.

summary: The Core Plan provides a useful first MVP direction but needs adversarial narrowing, legal/compliance packet work, source verification, and operational psychometric artifacts.
